response.justification: Maria is a seasoned full-stack engineer with 15+ years of experience, strong TypeScript/Node.js skills, cloud exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), and recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic tooling. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and her AI/GenAI experience only began around April 2025. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI, which are core to this staff-level GenAI position.
strengths: Recent hands-on experience with MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure
15+ years of production software experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Strong engineering-excellence background (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring via workshops and courses)
concerns: Falls far short of the 8+ years of AI-driven solution development requirement (~1 year of AI-adjacent work)
No demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
No evidence of customer-facing technical discovery or forward-deployed consulting experience

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and MCP/agentic exposure
